summary: Workflow references undefined fixtures (fixtures/package.json, fixtures/license-config.json, fixtures/mock-license-db.json at lines 24,30) causing immediate failure when run. Script lacks input validation for file paths and defensive programming. Workflow steps 18-31 are duplicative (should use matrix strategy or composite action). Critical task requirements not met: no Pester tests demonstrated, no actionlint validation shown, no act-result.txt artifact, no TDD process evidence. Not production-ready; will fail in CI immediately.
